proposed_taxonomy.evidence_summary: Stored descriptions consistently present Photonmelodies as a compilation of three story-driven Muv-Luv side stories and follow-up scenarios, emphasizing novella-length adventures, character interactions, romance/comedy, lore, and narrative continuation rather than action mechanics. The copy repeatedly frames the experience around 'stories,' 'spinoff title,' 'follow-up,' 'your story to unfold,' and spending one-on-one time with characters. No concrete evidence supports shooter, tactics, or other active gameplay loops in this package, while the franchise presentation here is clearly narrative-first, single-player, casual, and authored. That strongly fits visual_novel.

staged_neighbors.why_similar: Directly tied storywise and structurally; another long-form Muv-Luv visual novel centered on heavy narrative payoff and character-driven routes.
The franchise foundation with the same VN format, school-life romance setup, and branching character-focused storytelling that photonmelodies revisits.
A sister compilation of Muv-Luv side stories and fan-oriented VN content with the same anthology-style reading experience.
A character-route visual novel blending slice-of-life romance/comedy with darker military and conspiracy backstory elements.
Another sci-fi visual novel strongly driven by route-based storytelling, relationship scenes, and larger high-stakes plot reveals.
